summary: Test suite covers core label-assignment logic adequately but has critical gaps. No tests for CLI (cli.ts) despite it being required functionality—no coverage of argument parsing, environment variable handling, or error handling in the entry point. Priority ordering is mentioned in requirements but tested superficially (test just checks label presence, not that priority affects behavior). Limited edge case coverage: no tests for case sensitivity, empty patterns, complex nested globs, or malformed rules. Missing integration tests beyond one PR workflow example. Design is reasonably organized with good cleanup, but test data is hardcoded and brittle (file creation/deletion). Would fail to catch regressions in CLI, priority logic, and pattern edge cases.
